title: Pan-Seared Sea Bass with Roasted Vegetables
description: A German-inspired dish featuring pan-seared sea bass served with a variety of roasted vegetables. This recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner and can be prepared in under 30 minutes.

ingredients.name: roasted
ingredients.amount: 2 cups mixed vegetables (such as Brussels sprouts, carrots, and red bell peppers)

instructions: Season the sea bass with salt and cumin.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the mixed vegetables to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until tender.
Add the sea bass to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and roast for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until the fish is cooked through.
Serve the sea bass with the roasted vegetables and German-style potato salad.
